title: Foreign Fridays ATL
description: Hip-hop, Afrobeats, Reggae & R&B nightclub party. Atlanta's premier Friday night vibes with multiple genres on rotation. Dress code enforced, great rooftop energy. Perfect for couples who love to dance and enjoy a lively club scene.

title: Latin Vibes Night
description: Feel the heat of tropical Latin rhythms — bachata, salsa, merengue, and more. Tago Life Center hosts Atlanta's most energetic Latin night with live DJs and a full bar. Beginner-friendly lesson at 6:30 PM, open dance floor from 8 PM onward.

title: Is This Going To Cause An Argument – Marcus & Angel Comedy
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE
description: Husband-and-wife comedy duo Marcus and Angel bring their hilarious take on relationships to City Winery. Wine, dine, and laugh together — perfect for couples who enjoy smart, relatable comedy. Full dinner menu available.

title: Jess Hilarious – Special Event
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Peachtree St NE
description: Comedian Jess Hilarious (MTV, Comedy Central) performs back-to-back shows at Atlanta's top comedy club. Drinks, good food, and non-stop laughter in an intimate 21+ setting. Great for a sophisticated date night with edge.

title: Afro Beat & Caribbean Vibes Night
description: Catch the rhythm and feel the heat — Tropical Vibes Night brings the best of Afrobeat, dancehall, soca, and Caribbean music to Atlanta. Live performances, tropical cocktails, and a packed dance floor. A vibrant couples' night out.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
description: Atlanta's funniest comics in one room — rotating lineup of the city's best stand-up talent. 21+ venue, full bar, no drink minimum. Laughing Skull is a beloved Atlanta institution. Perfect for couples who appreciate raw, local comedy.

title: The Late Night R&B Experience Tour
description: An evening of live R&B featuring top artists on the noise complaints tour. Great for couples who love smooth vocals, slow jams, and a live concert atmosphere in Buckhead's intimate theatre setting.

title: Saturday Night Latin Dance @ Eclipse Di Luna
location: Eclipse Di Luna, 4505 Ashford Dunwoody Rd NE, Buckhead
description: GO Latin Dance hosts weekly Saturday salsa and bachata at one of Buckhead's best Latin restaurants. Free lesson at 9 PM, open dancing until 1 AM. Great food, great music, no pressure — perfect for a low-key couples' dance date.

title: LINES OF PLAY – ABV Gallery Group Exhibition (30+ Artists)
description: A massive group show celebrating the World Cup with 30+ artists — painting, illustration, digital art, and more. Free admission, cash bar, great crowd. Awesome for art-loving couples who want to discover new work and support local artists.

title: Marcia Wood Gallery Opening – Susan Ker-Seymer
location: Marcia Wood Gallery, 424 Marletta St SW
description: Opening night for Susan Ker-Seymer's exhibit at one of Atlanta's most respected contemporary galleries. Wine reception, artist meet-and-greet, elegant Midtown setting. Sophisticated and free — perfect for an upscale cultural date.

title: Artful ATL – Atlanta Contemporary Benefit
description: Annual benefit for Atlanta Contemporary — emerging artists, art enthusiasts, live music, food and cocktails. A stylish, art-forward date night that supports Atlanta's creative community. Great vibes and a meaningful experience.

title: Salsa Social @ Callanwolde Fine Arts Center
location: Callanwolde Fine Arts Center, 980 Briarcliff Rd NE
description: Monthly salsa social with a live band and DJ — dance in the beautiful historic mansion setting of Callanwolde. All levels welcome, great community vibe, and a covered outdoor dance floor. Romantic and low-pressure.

title: Vegan Takeover – Kamayan Filipino Restaurant
description: Plant-based Filipino feast at Kamayan — vegan lumpia, adobo, sisig, and more. A fun, adventurous food date for couples who want to explore vegan cuisine with bold Filipino flavors. Walk-ins welcome, cash only.

title: SABOR @ Block & Drum
description: Latin jazz, salsa, and live percussion at Block & Drum in Chamblee. Intimate venue, incredible musicians, full bar and small plates. Great for couples who want a more intimate live music experience away from the big crowds.
